description: XM is a global Forex & CFD broker focusing on trading fairness, cost transparency, and a human-centric experience for traders. XM is renowned for its rapid execution, zero intervention during major news events, and consistent trading conditions without manipulation.

profile.total_instruments: 1000+ (Forex, Indices, Energy, Metals, Stock CFDs, Crypto CFDs, Turbo Instruments (comprehensive), etc.)

summary.execution: Ultra-fast execution, no requotes or rejections

accountTypes: Ideal for general traders & manual trading
Ideal for active traders & tighter spreads
keyAdvantages: Orders executed under 66ms during high impact news like NFP, FOMC, or CPI
advantages: Competitive spreads on Ultra Low & Zero accounts
disadvantages: Standard account spreads can be higher
Zero account commission is standard ($7 per lot)
Educational features are not as strong as some top tier brokers

faqs.question: Is XM safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. XM is regulated by several major authorities such as the FCA, ASIC, CySEC, etc.

faqs.question: What is the maximum leverage?
faqs.answer: Up to 1:1000 depending on the country/entity.

faqs.question: Is a demo account available?
faqs.answer: Yes, demo accounts are available for trading practice.
